message: Explored codebase: TestBoardFactory, TestPublisher, TestSubscriber, AutoCompleteSystemTests style, HintSystem source, MoveEnumerator, GameMessages

Written Assets/Tests/EditMode/HintSystemTests.cs with 27 tests covering all acceptance criteria: hint cycling, cache invalidation, no-op on empty board, HintHighlightMessage content, HintClearedMessage on board change and reset, constructor null guards, dispose behavior
Starting P6.T2 MoveEnumerator Tests - reading source files
Read all context files. Writing MoveEnumeratorTests.cs now
MoveEnumeratorTests.cs written with 40 tests covering all 5 move types, completeness, short-circuit, empty board, stock draw, multi-card runs, and face-down card edge cases
